_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of YAP/TAZ-driven TEAD activity prevents growth of NF2-null schwannoma and meningioma.

_contextSnippet: For TEAD protein expression in VT1- or VT2-treated animals, a pan-TEAD antibody showed significant changes in TEAD proteins expression only with VT2 drug in vivo (compare Fig. 2K for VT1; Fig. 2N for VT2)
details: Showed significant changes in TEAD protein expression only with VT2 drug treatment in vivo, but not with VT1 treatment
